name: rendezvous

scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build

_comment: Root package.json — required by Vercel to understand the monorepo structure.
The build script installs client dependencies and runs the CRA production build.
vercel.json points @vercel/static-build at client/package.json so Vercel runs
the client's own build script directly; this root build script is a convenience
for running the same build locally: `npm run build` from the project root.
The server/ directory has its own package.json and is deployed independently
as a serverless function — no root-level install step is needed for the server.
